zh.lifeSummary: 當Hope Virginia Grubbs於1426年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，她的父親John M Grubbs27歲，母親Susan Catherine Swartz21歲。她於1446年與Sir Walter Barnham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1487年在她的家鄉享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grubbs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Grubb , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Grubb
meanings: English: unflattering nickname for a physically small person, from Middle English grub(be), grob(be), crubbe; ‘grub, insect larva’.
Probably an Americanized form of German   Grube  .

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

nameMeanings.name: Virginia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Virginia   or (occasionally)   Jane .

variants.name: Ginnie
meanings: Pet form of   Virginia   or (occasionally)   Jane .

en.lifeSummary: When Hope Virginia Grubbs was born in 1426, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John M Grubbs, was 27 and her mother, Susan Catherine Swartz, was 21. She married Sir Walter Barnham in 1446. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1487, in her hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hope Virginia Grubbs est née en 1426, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John M Grubbs, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Susan Catherine Swartz, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Barnham en 1446. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1487, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Hope Virginia Grubbs(이)가 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John M Grubbs(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susan Catherine Swartz(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1446년 Sir Walter Barnham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hope Virginia Grubbs родилась в 1426 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John M Grubbs было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Catherine Swartz, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Barnham в 1446 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1487 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год.
